testcase.name: test_sitemap_public_returns_xml

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected XML content-type, got text/html; charset=utf-8. Body starts with: '<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
 <head>
 <meta charset="utf-8" />
 <meta name="viewport" content="widt' assert 'xml' in 'text/html; charset=utf-8' + where 'text/html; charset=utf-8' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xffb5322c8710>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xffb5322c8710> = 'text/html; charset=utf-8'.lower

testcase.failure:
E AssertionError: Expected XML content-type, got text/html; charset=utf-8. Body starts with: '<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
 <head>
 <meta charset="utf-8" />
 <meta name="viewport" content="widt' assert 'xml' in 'text/html; charset=utf-8' + where 'text/html; charset=utf-8' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xffb5322c8710>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xffb5322c8710> = 'text/html; charset=utf-8'.lower

testcase.name: test_robots_public_returns_backend_content
